title: Replantment
description: Adds a simple Replant enchantment to Minecraft 1.21.
body:
### Usage
To use, you must first enchant your hoe with Replant. The enchantment is available in the enchanting table.
When you break a crop with a hoe that has the Replant enchantment, it removes one of it's appropriate seed or crop from your inventory and automatically replants the crop in it's place. 
It will not work if you do not have seeds of the particular crop in your inventory.

### Support for replanting:
* Wheat
* Beetroots
* Potatoes
* Carrots
* Nether Wart
* Sugar Cane
* Bamboo
* Torchflower
* Pither Plant
* Cocoa Beans
#### If farmer's delight mod present:
* Onions
* Cabbages
* Mushroom colonies

If you want installation instructions, check the Minecraft Wiki tutorial for it [here](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Tutorials/Installing_a_data_pack).

Russian translation (requires installation on client) thanks to [liroxdeyamon](https://github.com/liroxdeyamon).
